title: If an employer complies with an order made under paragraph 5(1),
content:
or secures the payment to the employee of the full amount of debt 
by any other arrangement under paragraph 5(2), the warrant issued 
under paragraph 3 shall be discharged and the employer shall be 
released.

metadata.source_file: Cap 57 Consolidated version for the Whole Chapter (24-08-2025) (English).pdf
